title: Translating XPath Expressions to CSS Selectors
scenario: Translate XPath expressions to equivalent CSS selectors for querying HTML documents. The input may include complex XPath expressions, and the output should demonstrate an understanding of CSS selectors and XPath syntax.
constraints: Must correctly handle attribute selectors and pseudo-elements

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output correctly maps XPath expressions to CSS selectors.
Check if the output uses CSS selectors.
Check if the output correctly handles attribute selectors and pseudo-elements.
